"vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.20`
- Patched version: `2026.4.20`

## Impact

Feishu card-action callbacks could synthesize a message event with DM conversations classified as group conversations. That skipped `dmPolicy` enforcement for card actions, so a sender in a Feishu DM could trigger card-action flows that should have been blocked by a restrictive DM policy.

The issue is limited to Feishu card-action handling. Severity is medium.

## Fix

OpenClaw now resolves Feishu card-action chat type before dispatch, including API lookup when stored context is unavailable, and avoids falling through to group handling for DMs.

Fix commit:

- `90979d7c3ef7ec30b9f8aa6963a5e38d2f17d166`

## Release

Fixed in OpenClaw `2026.4.20`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-72q8-jcmc-97wx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-25T23:46:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-72q8-jcmc-97wx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-72q8-jcmc-97wx"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-25T23:46:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-72q8-jcmc-97wx", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/90979d7c3ef7ec30b9f8aa6963a5e38d2f17d166", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-72q8-jcmc-97wx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-72q8-jcmc-97wx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Feishu card actions could misclassify DMs and skip dmPolicy", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-25T23:46:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-72q8-jcmc-97wx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Feishu card actions could misclassify DMs and skip dmPolicy
